text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation standing at the threshold of an empty conference room—rows of chairs seem to await stories and intellect, yet the absence of people makes the space feel contemplative, almost like a silent pause before a symphony begins. In the second scene, surrounded by the vibrant, intellectual energy of an exhibit about research and development, I am inspired by the creative melding of technology and language. Here, ideas come alive on screens and walls, urging me to reflect on human curiosity and our endless drive to connect and innovate. These environments both challenge and invigorate my thoughts about the nature of human progress.
